userPlatform.title: User Platform
userPlatform.notes:
Issues Identified in the Beta Version of the WeTrials Chat Assistant

CORS (Cross-Origin Resource Sharing)(High): The backend accepts requests from any website without verifying the source, which could allow a malicious site. This must be fixed on the backend, not in Labrador.

No authentication (High): Chat sessions and messages can be created without login or API key. Security controls must be implemented on the backend.

Extra API actions (Medium): The API allows more actions than the app needs. These should be restricted by the Platform team.

Suggest deploying on development ASAP and address the issue while reviewing the overall feature for production readiness.

Featured Studies Rotation Prototype
https://claude.ai/public/artifacts/d1f405eb-b1ac-4c9f-bccf-b9c804967e97

userPlatform.title: User Platform
userPlatform.notes:
Chat Bot - From discussion Ridham Kathiriya and Hoon Choi the current chatbot beta version will be integrated within the development env., and after finalizing the use cases and requirements, it will be finalized and released to production.

AI Medical Analyzer - The current infrastructure allows us to deliver the Analyzer that generates a summarized report of the user/patient medical record, and simplifies it to allow users to better understand their condition and details, including important elements like biomarkers. This fulfills one of the pillars of WeTrials: Simplify.

Sponsored / Featured Studies Rotation - https://aramgyum.github.io/Featured-Study-Rotation/
Updates in progress, Show 5 featured studies + “See all”, Add a note that featured studies rotate over time for fair visibility

partnerPlatform.title: Partner Platform

analytics.notes:
We need to consolidate analytics tracking and dashboards for consistent reporting across all platforms and deployments, in collaboration with the marketing team.

https://lookerstudio.google.com/reporting/011c2f97-66d8-4164-8a64-b78526b8eabc

🧾 Analytics Update — Switch to Observed Users
We are switching our GA4 reporting identity from Blended to Observed to ensure consistency across our dashboards.

🔄 What changed
Before (Blended):
 - Combined device data + Google Signals + modeled users
 - Deduplicates users across devices (e.g., phone + laptop = 1 user)
 - Includes estimated / modeled data
Now (Observed):
 - Uses only actual data (device ID + user ID if available)
 - No modeling or estimation
 - Same user on multiple devices may be counted multiple times

customModules.name: ACL Caregiver AI Prize Challenge
customModules.notes:
Required in Email:
- Team name, members, and primary contact
- Selected application track
- Brief description of AI solution + caregiver impact (max 500 words)

Key Requirements:
- Must designate a primary contact (U.S. citizen or permanent resident, 18+)
- Primary contact handles all communication

Notes:
- Submission is draft/tentative and can be updated later
- Q&A responses will be posted publicly on the challenge page

userPlatform.title: User Platform
userPlatform.notes:
1. Study Title Optimization - The Study Title Optimization experiment can be considered successful; however, the approach does not guarantee sufficient simplification or searchability.
As a result, the Product team is proposing a revised structure for the study card. This includes keeping the original study title (brief title) unchanged, while introducing a short, user-friendly explanation of the study.
This approach acknowledges that many study titles are already easy to understand, while for those that include complex terminology (e.g., medication or device names), a concise explanation (up to 20 words or two sentences) will help clarify the study purpose.

2. Beta version for WeTrials AI Assistant - New version https://staging2.wetrials.com/abta-staging/#/study prototype using LangSmith and Claude Haiku  4.5

3. Expected ti have Beta AI Medical Analyzer on development during week March 30 - April 2 

4. Create a new alternative AI video example for BCC -The scenario was updated and shared with Alex Jung

5. Sponsored / Featured Studies Rotation - https://aramgyum.github.io/Featured-Study-Rotation/ Development in progress
